title: State of the Feed — Week of June 29–5, 2026
content_html:
Week of June 29–July 5, 2026 processed 14 runs with 13,776 articles fetched and 672 quality articles delivered across eight content categories. News dominated intake at 350 articles, followed by wellness at 86 and AI-tech at 84. The dimensional Q/R/L composite scoring model (weights 0.25/0.55/0.20) maintained an average delivery rate of 48 quality articles per run. No new feeds were added during the week, and no benchmark data is available to assess pipeline efficiency against established noise-to-signal thresholds.

Feed health monitoring identified 27 feeds with errors, including five Kagi-sourced feeds: LoRaMeshDevices, Indigenous Technology and Innovation, BC Wildfire and Conservation, BC Working Lands, and Rural BC Infrastructure. These feeds require investigation and remediation to restore consistent data delivery. Top discovery candidates for potential addition include LoRaMeshDevices (92.0), Daniele Messi. — Writing (75.0), and 3D Printing blog (72.0), pending feed health validation.
